_doc: Sticker Galaxy Arcade — Game Manifest v2. Submit via /council propose_minigame in the Galactic Council Telegram group.
_review_required: Fields tagged [REQUIRED] must be filled before submitting. Unfilled [REQUIRED] fields will fail automated lint and block your review.
name: Your Game Name
_name_note: [REQUIRED] Display name in the Arcade. Short (≤24 chars). Shown in leaderboards, result screens, and the sector map.
_studio_note: [REQUIRED] Your studio display name. Shown in the Arcade listing.
_studio_ton_wallet_note: [REQUIRED] Your TON wallet address for revenue payouts. You receive 70% of every in-game purchase. Cannot be changed after first payout.
_genre_note: [REQUIRED] One of: arcade, puzzle, racing, auto-battler, idle, other.
_sector_note: [REQUIRED] The Sticker Galaxy sector your game belongs to (e.g. cantina-district, dagobah, coruscant). Sets your visual/lore context.
description: One sentence: what makes your game fun.
_description_note: Shown in the Arcade listing. 120 chars max.
_url_note: [REQUIRED] Production URL. Must be HTTPS. The host launches your game in an iframe at this URL with ?session_token=... appended.
_sandbox_url_note: Optional staging URL used by Council reviewers during approval. If omitted, reviewers use the production url.
_max_score_note: [REQUIRED] Realistic maximum a skilled human can achieve. NOT 99999. Get this wrong and players earn 1 midi per run. Halve or double after first week of telemetry if median is outside 40–70% of max.
_perfect_score_achievable_note: Set true only if a flawless run can hit max_score exactly. Enables the Exceptional Eight leaderboard rule.
_play_duration_note: [REQUIRED] [min, max] seconds for a single run. Used for midi-per-second fair-play calibration.
_trophy_enabled_note: Opt into monthly leaderboard trophies (gold/silver/bronze). Set false if your game has no persistent leaderboard.
_wager_enabled_note: Set true to enable player-vs-player midi wagering. Requires additional Council review.
_esport_tier_note: Set true if your game uses seeded PRNG + fixed-step physics + input recording (see MINIGAME_BUILDER_GUIDE §7). Enables Daily Challenge mode.

cosmetic_items._comment: Delete this block if you have no cosmetics. Cosmetic items must have no gameplay effect.
cosmetic_items.name: Example Skin
cosmetic_items.description: A cosmetic skin — zero gameplay effect.

_tournament_comment: Delete the tournament block entirely if you don't want monthly tournaments.
